ctx.name: Tom
ctx.notes: PR reviews have been taking longer than usual and commits have thinned out over the last 2-3 weeks. Was very energetic when they joined 8 months ago. Missed the last two team socials. One teammate hinted there was friction over a design-system PR that got reworked heavily. I don't want this to be a performance conversation — I want to understand what's going on.

focusPoints.label: Energy and motivation levels lately
focusPoints.reason: Notes mention a drop in energy since joining. Could be fatigue, personal issues, or something else affecting motivation — worth exploring.

focusPoints.label: Connection with the team and peers
focusPoints.reason: Missing two team socials signals potential disconnection. Worth asking how they feel about their relationships in the team.

focusPoints.label: Blockers on the design-system PR
focusPoints.reason: Mention of friction on the design-system PR suggests possible challenges. Clarifying what's stuck could uncover underlying issues.

focusPoints.label: Current workload and pacing
focusPoints.reason: Slower PR reviews and thinner commits could indicate workload issues. Understanding their current capacity will help frame the conversation.

focusPoints.label: Feedback on recent work and collaborations
focusPoints.reason: No specific signal — understanding how they perceive feedback from peers could provide insights into their current experience.

transcript.question: How connected do you feel to the rest of the team right now?
transcript.answer: Honestly kind of drained. I haven't been sleeping well and I'm behind on things.

transcript.question: What have you had to drop or slow down to keep up with everything on your plate?
transcript.answer: A bit disconnected. I don't really know the team outside of tickets, and I missed the last two socials.

transcript.question: What kind of support would make the next couple of weeks easier for you?
transcript.answer: The design-system PR — I got a ton of rework feedback and I'm not sure if I did something wrong or if that's just how reviews go here.

transcript.question: I wanted to ask about the design-system PR — what made that one hard to land?
transcript.answer: I've been putting off the follow-up on that PR. Every time I open it I feel a bit sick.

transcript.question: What do you want to get back to feeling steady on first?
transcript.answer: Priorities — I'm not sure. I just do what's on my board. I can't really tell what's important vs busywork.

transcript.question: What parts of the frontend work still feel worth leaning into for you?
transcript.answer: Not really. I'm usually scrolling at 11pm trying to not think about work.

transcript.question: How has the feedback on your recent work landed for you?
transcript.answer: I probably don't ask for enough feedback. I don't want to seem like I don't know what I'm doing.

transcript.question: Where do you feel like you're not getting enough stretch right now?
